scripts.build:mac-arm: npm run clean && tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin -b app && ditto -c -k --sequesterRsrc --keepParent 'src-tauri/target/aarch64-apple-darwin/release/bundle/macos/CSV Pro.app' 'src-tauri/target/aarch64-apple-darwin/release/bundle/macos/CSV_Pro_mac_arm64.zip'
scripts.build:mac-intel: npm run clean && tauri build --target x86_64-apple-darwin -b app && ditto -c -k --sequesterRsrc --keepParent 'src-tauri/target/x86_64-apple-darwin/release/bundle/macos/CSV Pro.app' 'src-tauri/target/x86_64-apple-darwin/release/bundle/macos/CSV_Pro_mac_intel.zip'
scripts.build:win: npm run clean && tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc -b msi
scripts.build:win-arm: npm run clean && tauri build --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc -b msi
